title: randia merrillii
intro: Randia merrillii, also known as the Philippine randia or randia, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Randia merrillii typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
